display.title: Display & Sound
display.subtitle: Tune visuals and audio alerts to your preferences.
display.displayDescription: Adjust how the window renders backgrounds and effects.
display.usageShowRemainingSubtitle: Display what is left instead of what is used.
display.showMessageFilePathSubtitle: Display the parent path next to file links in messages.
display.splitChatDiffViewTitle: Split chat and diff center panes
display.splitChatDiffViewSubtitle: Show chat and diff side by side instead of swapping between them.
display.threadTitleAutogenerationSubtitle: Generate a short title from your first message (uses extra tokens).
display.chatDescription: Control how much conversation history is retained per thread.
display.unlimitedChatHistorySubtitle: Keep full thread history in memory (may impact performance).
display.scrollbackHelp: Higher values keep more history but may increase memory usage. Use "Sync from server" on a thread to re-fetch older messages.
display.maxItemsPerThreadRange: Range: {{min}}–{{max}}. Counts messages, tool calls, and other conversation items.
display.reduceTransparencySubtitle: Use solid surfaces instead of glass.
display.uiFontFamilyHelp: Applies to all UI text. Leave empty to use the default system font stack.
display.codeFontFamilyHelp: Applies to git diffs and other mono-spaced readouts.
display.codeFontSizeHelp: Adjusts code and diff text size.
display.notificationSoundsSubtitle: Play a sound when a long-running agent finishes while the window is unfocused.
display.systemNotificationsSubtitle: Show a system notification when a long-running agent finishes while the window is unfocused.
display.subagentNotificationsSubtitle: Include spawned sub-agent threads in system notifications.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: App version, build metadata, and update controls.
about.automaticChecksSubtitle: When enabled, CodexBuddy checks for new app versions on launch.
about.unavailable: Updates are unavailable in this runtime.
about.latest: You are on the latest version.

server.title: Server
server.subtitleMobile: Configure TCP host/token from your desktop setup, then run a connection test.
server.subtitleDesktop: Configure how CodexBuddy exposes TCP backend access for mobile and remote clients. Desktop usage remains local unless you explicitly connect through remote mode.
server.backendModeHelp: Local keeps desktop requests in-process. Remote routes desktop requests through the same TCP transport path used by mobile clients.
server.switchHelp: Switch the active remote here. The fields below edit the active entry.
server.keepDaemonTitle: Keep daemon running after app closes
server.keepDaemonSubtitle: If disabled, CodexBuddy stops managed TCP daemon processes before exit.
server.remoteBackendHelpMobile: Use the Tailscale host from your desktop CodexBuddy app (Server section), for example `macbook.your-tailnet.ts.net:4732`.
server.remoteBackendHelpDesktop: This host/token is used by mobile clients and desktop remote-mode testing.
server.connectionTestHelp: Make sure your desktop app daemon is running and reachable on Tailscale, then retry this test.
server.daemonHelp: Start this daemon before connecting from iOS. It uses your current token and listens on 0.0.0.0:<port>, matching your configured host port.
server.daemonError: Mobile daemon is in an error state.
server.installTailscale: Install Tailscale on both desktop and iOS to continue.
server.commandTemplateLabel: Command template (manual fallback) for starting the daemon:
server.tokenRequired: Remote backend token is empty. Set one before exposing daemon access.
server.footerMobile: Use your own infrastructure only. On iOS, get the Tailscale hostname and token from your desktop CodexBuddy setup.
server.footerDesktop: Mobile access should stay scoped to your own infrastructure (tailnet). CodexBuddy does not provide hosted backend services.
server.deleteRemoteMessage: Remove {{name}} from saved remotes? This only removes the profile from this device.

composer.title: Composer
composer.subtitle: Control helpers and formatting behavior inside the message editor.
composer.followUpBehaviorHelp: Choose the default while a run is active. Press {{shortcut}} to send the opposite behavior for one message.
composer.showFollowUpHintSubtitle: Displays queue/steer shortcut guidance above the composer.
composer.steerUnavailable: Steer is unavailable in the current Codex config.
composer.steerUnavailableHelp: Steer is unavailable in the current Codex config. Follow-ups will queue.
composer.quickCommandsSubtitle: Add reusable prompts that can be inserted from the composer toolbar.
composer.quickCommandsTextPlaceholder: Enter the prompt inserted into the composer
composer.quickCommandsHelp: The toolbar button inserts the command at the current cursor position instead of sending it immediately.
composer.presetsSubtitle: Choose a starting point and fine-tune the toggles below.
composer.presetHelp: Presets update the toggles below. Customize any setting after selecting.
composer.expandOnSpaceSubtitle: Typing ``` then Space inserts a fenced block.
composer.expandOnEnterSubtitle: Use Enter to expand ``` lines when enabled.
composer.languageTagsSubtitle: Allows ```lang + Space to include a language.
composer.wrapSelectionSubtitle: Wraps selected text when creating a fence.
composer.copyWithoutFencesSubtitle: When enabled, Copy is plain text. Hold {{key}} to include ``` fences.
composer.autoWrapMultilineSubtitle: Wraps multi-line paste inside a fenced block.
composer.autoWrapCodeLikeSubtitle: Wraps long single-line code snippets on paste.
composer.continueListsSubtitle: Continues numbered and bulleted lists when the line has content.

commonLinks.title: Common links
commonLinks.subtitle: Manage reusable links shown in the sidebar popover.
commonLinks.help: Links appear in the sidebar popover after both label and URL are valid.

dictation.title: Dictation
dictation.subtitle: Enable microphone dictation with on-device transcription.
dictation.enableSubtitle: Downloads the selected Whisper model on first use.
dictation.languageHelp: Auto-detect stays on; this nudges the decoder toward your preference.
dictation.holdKeyHelp: Hold the key to start dictation, release to stop and process.

environments.title: Environments
environments.subtitle: Configure per-project setup scripts and worktree locations.
environments.setupScriptHelp: Runs once in a dedicated terminal after each new worktree is created.
environments.worktreesFolderHelp: Custom location for worktrees. Leave empty to use the default location.

git.title: Git
git.subtitle: Manage how diffs are loaded in the Git sidebar.
git.ignoreWhitespaceSubtitle: Hides whitespace-only changes in local and commit diffs.

commitPromptHelp.before: Used when generating commit messages. Include

git.commitMessageModelHelp: The model used when generating commit messages. Leave on default to use the workspace model.

openApps.title: Open in
openApps.subtitle: Customize the Open in menu shown in the title bar and file previews.
openApps.commandHelp: Commands receive the selected path as the final argument.

platformHelp.mac: Apps open via `open -a` with optional args.
platformHelp.other: Apps run as an executable with optional args.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Group related workspaces and reorder projects within each group.
projects.groupsSubtitle: Create group labels for related repositories.
projects.projectsSubtitle: Assign projects to groups and adjust their order.
projects.deleteGroupDetail: Projects in this group will move to "{{ungroupedLabel}}".

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Customize keyboard shortcuts for file actions, composer, panels, and navigation.
shortcuts.searchHelp: Filter by section name, action, or default shortcut.
shortcuts.pressNewHelp: Press a new shortcut while focused. Default: {{shortcut}}

file.title: File
file.subtitle: Create agents and worktrees from the keyboard.

composer.title: Composer
composer.subtitle: Cycle between model, access, reasoning, and collaboration modes.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Manage stable and experimental Codex features.
features.personalitySubtitle: Choose Codex communication style (writes top-level personality in config.toml).
features.pauseQueuedTitle: Pause queued messages when a response is required
features.pauseQueuedSubtitle: Keep queued messages paused while Codex is waiting for plan accept/changes or your answers.
features.noStable: No stable feature flags returned by Codex.
features.noExperimental: No preview or under-development feature flags returned by Codex.
features.connectWorkspace: Connect a workspace to load Codex feature flags.
features.removed: Legacy feature flag kept for backward compatibility.

featureDescriptions.undo: Create a ghost commit at each turn.
featureDescriptions.unified_exec: Use the single unified PTY-backed exec tool.
featureDescriptions.js_repl: Enable JavaScript REPL tools backed by a persistent Node kernel.
featureDescriptions.js_repl_tools_only: Only expose js_repl tools directly to the model.
featureDescriptions.search_tool: Removed legacy search flag kept for backward compatibility.
featureDescriptions.runtime_metrics: Enable runtime metrics snapshots via a manual reader.
featureDescriptions.sqlite: Persist rollout metadata to a local SQLite database.
featureDescriptions.memory_tool: Enable startup memory extraction and memory consolidation.
featureDescriptions.child_agents_md: Append additional AGENTS.md guidance to user instructions.
featureDescriptions.use_linux_sandbox_bwrap: Use the bubblewrap-based Linux sandbox pipeline.
featureDescriptions.request_rule: Allow approval requests and exec rule proposals.
featureDescriptions.experimental_windows_sandbox: Removed Windows sandbox flag kept for backward compatibility.
featureDescriptions.elevated_windows_sandbox: Removed elevated Windows sandbox flag kept for backward compatibility.
featureDescriptions.enable_request_compression: Compress streaming request bodies sent to codex-backend.
featureDescriptions.apps_mcp_gateway: Route Apps MCP calls through the configured gateway.
featureDescriptions.skill_mcp_dependency_install: Allow prompting and installing missing MCP dependencies.
featureDescriptions.skill_env_var_dependency_prompt: Prompt for missing skill environment variable dependencies.
featureDescriptions.steer: Enable turn steering capability when supported by Codex.
featureDescriptions.responses_websockets: Use Responses API WebSocket transport for OpenAI by default.
featureDescriptions.responses_websockets_v2: Enable Responses API WebSocket v2 mode.

codex.title: Codex
codex.subtitle: Configure the Codex CLI used by CodexBuddy and validate the install.
codex.pathHelp: Leave empty to use the system PATH resolution.
codex.argsHelp: Extra flags passed before app-server. Use quotes for values with spaces.
codex.sharedServerHelp: These settings apply to the shared Codex app-server used across all connected workspaces.

ignoredFlagsHelp.before: Per-thread override processing ignores unsupported flags:

codex.modelSubtitleNoWorkspace: Add a workspace to load available models.
codex.modelSubtitleLoading: Loading models from the first workspace…
codex.modelSubtitleReady: Sourced from the first workspace and used when there is no thread-specific override.
codex.reasoningEffortSubtitle: Available options depend on the selected model.
codex.reasoningEffortUnsupported: The selected model does not expose reasoning effort options.
codex.accessModeSubtitle: Used when there is no thread-specific override.
codex.reviewModeHelp: Choose whether /review runs in the current thread or a detached review thread.
codex.globalAgentsPlaceholder: Add global instructions for Codex agents…

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Configure multi-agent mode, limits, and custom agent roles.

builtinsHelp.before: Built-in roles from Codex are still available:

agents.maxThreadsSubtitle: Maximum open agent threads. Valid range: {{min}}-{{max}}. Changes save immediately.
agents.maxDepthSubtitle: Maximum nested spawn depth. Valid range: {{min}}-{{max}}. Changes save immediately.
agents.createSubtitle: Add a custom role under [agents.<name>] and create its config file.
agents.generateFieldsTitle: Generate description and developer instructions with AI
agents.modelFallbackLoading: Loading workspace model metadata. Using fallback model defaults for now.
agents.modelFallbackReady: Using fallback model defaults until workspace model metadata is available.
agents.configuredSubtitle: Manage custom roles and their per-agent config files.
agents.deletePrompt: Delete agent and managed config file?
agents.renameManagedFile: Rename managed config file when agent name changes

errors.maxThreads: Max threads must be an integer between {{min}} and {{max}}.
errors.maxDepth: Max depth must be an integer between {{min}} and {{max}}.
